steps.title: Undo multiplication by 8
steps.content: The equation is $$8x=88$$ Divide both sides by $8$ to isolate $x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A (‘$11$’) is $11$, so it is correct. Choice B (‘$80$’) comes from subtracting $8$, choice C (‘$96$’) comes from adding $8$, and choice D, $704$, would solve $\frac{x}{8}=88$, not $8x=88$.
